svg.title: Music API Architecture Diagram with Ports
svg.desc: Architecture flow from client through HTTP handler on port 8080, Redis cache on port 6379, to PostgreSQL repository on port 5432

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What HTTP methods does the client use?')
sendPrompt('What does the HTTP handler do?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis caching work for music data?')
sendPrompt('How does the repository query PostgreSQL?')
